robots.name: Logic Gates
robots.description: Interactive AND, OR, NOT, NAND, XOR, XNOR gates. Build truth tables, chain gates, see signals propagate.

robots.name: CPU Builder
robots.description: Build a working CPU from logic gates. ALU, registers, control unit, memory. Execute instructions step by step.

robots.name: ALU Simulator
robots.description: Arithmetic Logic Unit — add, subtract, AND, OR, shift. See the binary math happen bit by bit with carry propagation.

robots.name: Memory Hierarchy
robots.description: Visualize L1/L2/L3 cache, RAM, disk. Watch cache hits and misses. Understand why cache matters for performance.

robots.name: RISC-V Playground
robots.description: Write and run RISC-V assembly in your browser. See registers update, memory change, pipeline stages visualized.

robots.name: Transistor Physics
robots.description: MOSFET transistor simulation. Adjust gate voltage, see channel form, I-V curves update in real time.

robots.name: Flip-Flops & Counters
robots.description: SR, JK, D, T flip-flops. Build counters, shift registers, state machines. Clock signal visualization.

robots.name: FPGA Designer
robots.description: Place logic blocks, route signals, synthesize simple designs. Visual FPGA architecture exploration.
